scripts.build: npm run build -w @xliff-translator/core && npm run build -w @xliff-translator/server && npm run build -w @xliff-translator/web
scripts.build:desktop: npm run build && npm run build -w @xliff-translator/desktop
scripts.desktop:dev: npm run build:desktop && npm run dev -w @xliff-translator/desktop
scripts.desktop:pack: npm run build:desktop && npm run pack -w @xliff-translator/desktop
scripts.desktop:dist: npm run build:desktop && npm run dist -w @xliff-translator/desktop
scripts.desktop:dist:mac: npm run build:desktop && npm run dist:mac -w @xliff-translator/desktop
scripts.desktop:dist:win: npm run build:desktop && npm run dist:win -w @xliff-translator/desktop
scripts.desktop:dist:linux: npm run build:desktop && npm run dist:linux -w @xliff-translator/desktop
